phantomLabel: Olio Nuto 609 10lt (persisted DB) / Olio Noc 609 Della O.P. (Pass C raw this run) / Olio Nute 600g Dea (extract-invoice this run)
firstAppearance: GPT (Pass C raw JSON — before normalizeItems)

sourceInvoice.evidence: Manual transcription of invoice-full.png — exactly 8 product rows; no olive oil anywhere on page

crop.note: Geometry fix deployed — crop now includes all 8 real rows (was top=622 before fix). Crop cannot invent text.

ocr.note: No separate OCR stage; GPT vision reads cropped table image directly

gptPassCRaw.evidence: pass-c-raw.json via vl-prompt-compare on production table crop

afterNormalizeItems.note: normalizeItems preserves row count — does not add/remove lines

extractInvoiceResponse.note: GPT non-determinism — same crop, different phantom label vs pass-c-raw run seconds apart

persistence.note: DB reflects earlier extraction run (21:16 UTC); client inserted Pass C output verbatim — persistence did not create the phantom

hallucinationHypothesis: GPT fused visual cues from adjacent rows: Birra Peroni sub-line lot '6009', Aceto 'pet 5l*2' (10L volume), and numeric columns into a phantom olive-oil SKU. No 'Olio' text exists on the invoice.
